title: Day 23: Day 23 — Competitive Recruiting
content:
# Day 23 — Competitive Recruiting

## Topic
Recruiting from competitors without acting sloppy or desperate

## 3–5 Key Points
- **Competitive recruiting is about fit, not raiding for ego:** The goal is to attract agents who would genuinely perform better in your environment.
- **Professionalism matters:** You can recruit from competitors without being tacky, aggressive, or burning reputation.
- **Lead with the upgrade path:** Show how your brokerage offers better support, economics, systems, or growth—not just a change of logo.
- **Respect timing and relationships:** Pushing too hard makes you look desperate; disciplined follow-up works better.
- **Make switching feel safe:** Agents need confidence that the move will improve their business, not just create disruption.

## Why It Matters
Strong agents already work somewhere. If you want meaningful recruiting wins, you need to compete for talent credibly and professionally. Done right, competitive recruiting helps you attract proven performers without poisoning your reputation.
